all_events.title: 100-hour LDES battery technologies from Form, Noon and Ore: how do they compare?
all_events.summary: Form Energy, Noon Energy and Ore Energy are all commercialising proprietary 100-hour battery technologies for LDES applications, but how do they compare on metrics like cost, energy density and round-trip efficiency? We look at what they have revealed, as well as what they haven't.

evidence.observed_fact: 100-hour LDES battery technologies from Form, Noon and Ore: how do they compare?
evidence.observed_fact_detail: Form Energy, Noon Energy and Ore Energy are all commercialising proprietary 100-hour battery technologies for LDES applications, but how do they compare on metrics like cost, energy density and round-trip efficiency? We look at what they have revealed, as well as what they haven't.
evidence.why_it_matters: No specific investment pattern matched. Context only — not weighted without corroboration.

all_events.title: Form Energy signs 12GWh agreement to supply multi-day iron-air batteries to new US AI data centres
all_events.summary: Form Energy has signed a 12GWh supply agreement in the US for its iron-air batteries with AI data centre infrastructure developer Crusoe.

evidence.observed_fact: Form Energy signs 12GWh agreement to supply multi-day iron-air batteries to new US AI data centres
evidence.observed_fact_detail: Form Energy has signed a 12GWh supply agreement in the US for its iron-air batteries with AI data centre infrastructure developer Crusoe.
evidence.why_it_matters: Offtake/supply agreement is the clearest commercial-stage signal. LCOS competitiveness implied but requires contract terms for confirmation.
missing_evidence: Duration and renewal terms not public
evidence.confidence_rationale: Tier-1 event with company match and high score.

all_events.title: Crusoe taps not one but two novel battery technologies for AI buildout
all_events.summary: AI infrastructure startup Crusoe has always differentiated itself from its competitors by finding creative ways to tap energy. Now, it’s investing in two of the most potentially transformative battery technologies on the market. Crusoe has signed a deal with Form Energy to purchase 120 megawatts of iron-air…

evidence.observed_fact: Crusoe taps not one but two novel battery technologies for AI buildout

all_events.title: EnerVenue closes US$300 million Series B for 30,000-cycle nickel-hydrogen battery manufacturing
all_events.summary: EnerVenue, the US company commercialising technology adapted from nickel-hydrogen batteries, has closed a US$300 million extension of its Series B preferred stock financing round.

evidence.observed_fact: EnerVenue closes US$300 million Series B for 30,000-cycle nickel-hydrogen battery manufacturing
evidence.observed_fact_detail: EnerVenue, the US company commercialising technology adapted from nickel-hydrogen batteries, has closed a US$300 million extension of its Series B preferred stock financing round.
evidence.why_it_matters: Equity round confirms external capital validation. Key variables: investor identity (strategic vs. financial), round size vs. capex needs.
